creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Dear submitter, 

It seems that 'make package' and 'make deinstall' would fail on 
FreeBSD/amd64 7.0-BETA4, which indicates that there is something 
wrong with the pkg-plist generation, would you please take a look 
at it and revise the submission?  Thanks!
